text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the infirmary to pay
<chrname> a visit to since she
recently got injured... only to see a familiar figure
already standing by her bedside.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Here I go! A little poke, and your injury will be as
good as healed!
choice_data_list: What do you think you're doing?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Treating a patient, duh! This poor Umamusume
needs medical attention!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And if not an acupuncturist to give her a good
poke, then who?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I've even looked up chakra points that help treat
injuries! You have to give me a chance! Please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though I want to do everything I can for
<chrname>'s benefit, it doesn't feel
safe leaving her in the hands of Sasami
Anshinzawa.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I think you might be misunderstanding my
intentions. I'm not treating Umamusume just for
acupuncture's sake.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
It's the other way around! I'm doing acupuncture
for all Umamusume kind's sake!
choice_data_list:
...Can it be? You truly care that much about
Umamusume?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And I'd be elated if their futures involved more
needles...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Leave the rest to me. Sorry, I can't have people
milling about while I'm providing treatment, so
off you go!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
And while I'm at it, I'll take this opportunity to try
a few things! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Th-thump! Kablam! Zrrrt! Whirrr!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I-it's a miracle! She's in even better shape than
before she got injured... How can this be?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
It sure was nerve-wracking when I poked the
wrong chakra, but wow! I'm a genius! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Sasami proclaimed,
<chrname> has made a complete
recovery and is now stronger than ever!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
It was a great success! I guess info on Umatter can
be pretty trustworthy after all...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by the way, I took the liberty of activating a
few extra chakra that'll boost her strength! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as Sasami proclaimed,
<chrname> has recovered from her
injury and grown stronger!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Something doesn't feel quite right... It's
almost like the treatment's not working or
something...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Well, everyone has off days! Anyways, I'll be
going! The rest is up to you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might not have healed from her injuries, but
I'm just glad that <chrname> is safe
and sound.
